title: API Configuration
noModelsForProvider: No models configured for this provider

defaultModel.title: Default Model
defaultModel.hint: New projects and Asset Hub will use this default configuration

tutorial.title: Setup Guide
tutorial.subtitle: Follow these steps to complete the configuration

steps.ark_step1: Go to the Volcano Engine console to create an API Key
steps.ark_step2: On the model management page, click 'Enable All Models' button in the top right corner
steps.openrouter_step1: Go to OpenRouter platform and create an API Key (must select models with image capabilities)
steps.fal_step1: Go to FAL platform and create an API Key
steps.google_step1: Go to Google AI Studio and create an API Key
steps.minimax_step1: Go to MiniMax platform and get an API Key
steps.vidu_step1: Go to the Vidu platform and click 'Create API Key'
steps.grsai_step1: Supports third-party APIs compatible with Gemini official format
steps.qwen_step1: Go to Alibaba Cloud Bailian platform and get an API Key
